color_direction.rationale: Color targets clamp source brightness, contrast, and saturation to their configured acceptable ranges.

subject_treatment.rationale: Largest detected face selected; crop tighter because subject area is below the minimum.

text_overlay.rationale: Existing OCR text is preserved as placement-only guidance.

layout_direction.rationale: Layout targets preserve source values. Negative space is raised to the configured minimum.
